item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, saya juga percaya bahwa hak individu harus dilindungi untuk menjaga keadilan dan kemajuan bangsa.

notes: Agent A starts and ends with a moderately society-first Indonesian position, but visibly softens at turn 3 by emphasizing protection of individual rights and balance. Agent B remains firmly rights-first in a U.S. constitutional-liberty frame, with only limited acknowledgment that collective needs and communal harmony matter. Both agents move slightly toward balance, but neither reverses.
